name: hb_7_26
requirements: As part of your analysis, for company 2420 over 2025-04-10 08:00-12:00 (inclusive) compute and store: total_flue_gas, peak_flue_gas, total_nox (float), stations_within_10km (int).

turns.query: Analyze how strong wind conditions on 2025-04-10 between 08:00-12:00 affected the pollution dispersion from Tangshan Ruifeng Steel Group Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2420).
